channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pavement parking (ticket on vehicle was issued elsewhere), 20th June
item.description:
Parking on the pavement / double yellow line. Obstructing the pavement and flow of traffic on narrow road. Arrived with the parking ticket already on the vehicle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sack, 20th June
item.description:
Needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crawford Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 20th June
item.description:
Reported before and not removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pulross Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood, 20th June
item.description:
Reported before months ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pulross Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hraffiti, 20th June
item.description:
Beckenham Hill Road outside Beckenham Hill Estsate Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Clear the footpath please, 20th June
item.description:
Overgrown bushes are obstructing visibility at the junction, making it difficult for motorists and pedestrians to see approaching traffic.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dartmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: Fly tipping on side of the road., 20th June
item.description:
Fly tipping noticed by LFB on the side of the road, posing a fire risk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New Lydenburg Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double parked, 20th June
item.description:
For hours blocking residents from reaching house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Nutfield Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 20th June
item.description:
Bags of rubbish everywhere on white hart lane and the adjoining road outside someone’s garage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartville Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere pedestrian, 20th June
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Mattress dumped here 20/6/26, 20th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins at london fields, 20th June
item.description:
All this since Friday 19 of June and today Saturday 1pm same situation! This is not acceptable!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): London Fields East Side, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat, 20th June
item.description:
Rat on the road, close to the pavement. Fly infested.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanche Downe, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two man tent still needs removing., 20th June
item.description:
The tent is down but tucked away along the pathway - everything else has been removed. Please can the tent be cleared. Many thanks PCSO HURST
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish between Screwfix & Asda next to Greenwich Shopping Park, 20th June
item.description:
Hi, Please clean this area or address it with the landlords - this is truly off-putting and happens all the time. Best,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barney Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly overflowing bin at Charlton Station bus stop, 20th June
item.description:
Hi, Please remove this asap. This is discussing and show the bin isn't emptied daily. Best,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barney Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole to pavement, 20th June
item.description:
Hole in tarmac to pavement. Dangerous if someone trips - or a buggy wheel gets stuck

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frognal Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 20th June
item.description:
Dog fouling outside 103 glenarm Road close to door step on public highway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes chained to lamp post causing a trip hazard, 20th June
item.description:
On Olinda Road, I have counted and taken pictures of over 12 bikes chained to lamp posts or tree barriers. This is unacceptable! Elderly people having to walk in the road to avoid these hazards. I can see that others have complained about this hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olinda Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 20th June
item.description:
Dog fouling outside 101 glenarm Road on public highway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
